user_goal: 在 B013 之后做 Regime-Adaptive 策略的 stress validation 扩展：通过 yfinance opt-in fetcher（pip 包，免 API key，scripts/ 唯一网络入口）一次性获取真实 9 资产 2018-2025 snapshot，在真实数据上跑 B013 的 2020+2022 stress 回测，与 B006 momentum、B010 risk parity、static 60/40 跨策略对比,并以经验证据签收：把 B013 之前 skipped 的 stress gate 翻成 pass 或 fail（带经验数字）。若 fail 则写 proposed-learnings 建议参数 retune，**不修改 B013 策略代码**。全程保持 fixture/mock-first 默认 CI、no-live/no-secret-in-strategy/no-broker/no-paper/no-AI guards。Stooq pivot 历史：F001/F002 原 Stooq 实现因 upstream apikey gate 不可用，已替换为 yfinance 实现；F003 真实 acquisition 又遇到 importer coverage 过严（SPY holiday、SGOV 实际首日 2020-06-01），fix round 2 引入 first-trading-day tolerance + short-history allowance。

generator_handoff.fix_direction_delivered: Snapshot importer coverage policy relaxation. Importer no longer rejects acquisitions when (a) the first trading day in the requested window lands a few business days after date_from due to market holidays, or (b) a ticker in an explicit allow-list (default: SGOV) has a real-world first-available date later than date_from. Strategy code untouched.
fix_tasks_completed: Added DEFAULT_START_TOLERANCE_BUSINESS_DAYS (=5) and DEFAULT_SHORT_HISTORY_ALLOWANCE (=frozenset({'SGOV'})) constants to trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/snapshot.py.
Extended RegimeAdaptiveSnapshotRequest with allow_short_history and start_tolerance_business_days fields (defaults preserve research-only behavior; existing callers unaffected).

Rewrote _ensure_coverage: tolerance-first acceptance for actual_start gaps within N business days, then short-history exemption for tickers in the allowance, else fail-closed. Added _count_business_days_in_range helper. Negative tolerance is rejected up front.
Recorded short_history_exempt: bool per file in the manifest (kept out of _build_snapshot_id payload so snapshot_id stays stable across policy changes).
Updated scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py CLI with --allow-short-history (default 'SGOV') and --start-tolerance-business-days (default 5); passed both through to the request.

Added 8 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py covering: default constants, first-trading-day tolerance acceptance + non-exempt flag, excessive start-gap rejection, SGOV late-inception acceptance + exempt flag (other tickers stay non-exempt), short-history allowance disabled rejects SGOV, negative tolerance rejected, manifest contains short_history_exempt, snapshot_id stability across policy changes.
B013 strategy modules untouched. Existing snapshot tests + B013 safety regression tests pass unchanged.
Local checks pass: pytest 367 passed (359 prior + 8 new), ruff clean, compileall silent, mypy strict 42 source files clean.

post_fix_codex_workflow.notes_for_codex: Default CLI now applies SGOV short-history allowance and a 5-business-day start tolerance, so SPY's 2018-01-02 first trading day and SGOV's ~2020-06-01 first available date should both be accepted. If yfinance returns coverage beyond what is required, only the start-side is relaxed — end-date still must reach --to. Manifest now exposes short_history_exempt per file (snapshot_id is unaffected by this metadata).

expected_outputs.F006: docs/test-reports/B014-regime-adaptive-stress-validation-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md + optional framework/proposed-learnings.md entry if max DD > 15%

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-14 B014 data-source pivot: Codex reported Stooq /q/d/l/ endpoint now apikey-gated, blocking F003 real acquisition. Codex requested Generator add apikey support. User asked for an automated path that does not require apikey procurement. Planner overrode Codex's handoff direction: pivot Stooq → yfinance (pip package, free, no API key). Updated B014 spec with Amendment 2026-05-14 (yfinance is sole authorized network entry; stdlib-only constraint relaxed to allow yfinance in scripts/ only). Updated F001/F002 acceptance to specify yfinance. Generator handoff replaced with explicit fix tasks: delete Stooq fetcher + tests, add yfinance dependency, add yfinance fetcher + tests, preserve SGOV / >=95% coverage / opt-in / fail-closed semantics. Status remains fixing for Generator pickup. Original B014 hard decisions (universe, stress windows, cross-strategy comparison, no B013 strategy code mutation, proposed-learnings on stress failure) all retained.
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-14 B014 fixing (round 2, snapshot importer coverage policy): Codex confirmed yfinance fetcher itself works in production, but acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py rejected SPY (2018-01-01 is a NYSE holiday so first trading day is 2018-01-02) and SGOV (real first available date 2020-06-01, not the hardcoded 2020-05-28). Patched trade/strategies/regime_adaptive/snapshot.py: added DEFAULT_START_TOLERANCE_BUSINESS_DAYS=5 + DEFAULT_SHORT_HISTORY_ALLOWANCE=frozenset({'SGOV'}) constants; extended RegimeAdaptiveSnapshotRequest with allow_short_history + start_tolerance_business_days fields; rewrote _ensure_coverage with tolerance-first then short-history-exemption logic (so SGOV with a 1-day gap is accepted by tolerance and not flagged exempt, while SGOV at 2020-06-01 IS flagged exempt); added _count_business_days_in_range helper; manifest now records short_history_exempt: bool per file (excluded from _build_snapshot_id so snapshot_id is stable across policy changes); negative tolerance rejected. Updated scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py with --allow-short-history (default 'SGOV') + --start-tolerance-business-days (default 5) flags. Added 8 new unit tests in tests/unit/test_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py covering: default constants, first-trading-day tolerance acceptance, excessive start gap rejection, SGOV late-inception acceptance + exempt flag, allowance-disabled SGOV rejection, negative tolerance, manifest schema, snapshot_id stability across policy. Initial design returned short_history_exempt=True any time actual_start>required_from for SGOV; refined to tolerance-first so the flag is only set for genuine late-inception (not holiday-only) gaps. B013 strategy modules untouched. Local checks: pytest 367 passed (359 prior + 8 new), ruff clean, compileall silent, mypy strict 42 source files clean. Status moved to reverifying with fix_rounds=2; Codex re-runs F003 acquisition then F004/F005/F006.
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-14: yfinance fetcher execution succeeded and wrote real CSVs for the 9-asset universe, but snapshot import failed closed because scripts/acquire_regime_adaptive_snapshot.py requires coverage starting on the exact requested date. Evidence: SPY rejected due 2018-01-01 being a market holiday (first trading day 2018-01-02) and SGOV rejected because the real first available yfinance date is 2020-06-01. The next generator fix should relax snapshot import coverage to first trading day coverage and the actual SGOV inception/first-available date, without touching B013 strategy code.
